itinerary.travelName: “午夜陽光” 2026阿拉斯加夏季 | 北美最高峰-1小時迪納利山觀光飛機體驗（不含冰河登陸）

days.section: Denali Flightseeing Tour Not including glacier landing

sectionStops.label: Denali Flightseeing Tour Not including glacier landing

decodedJson.description:
Denali Flightseeing Tour:

Flying and overlook the snow-capped Denali and the majestic Alaskan Mountains. Weather permitting, you will have the opportunity to land on one of the Alaskan Mountains' ten thousand years old glaciers and experience the magnificence of being surrounded by snow mountains and take photos.

Take off time: 08:30AM or 06:30PM, the exact departure time will be confirmed 48 hours before departure.

Check in location：14212 E Second Street Talkeetna, AK 99676

cost.includesText:
1. Air ticket.

2. Service fees and taxes.
cost.excludesHtml:
1. Transportation to/from the airplane office.

2. After successfully landing on the glacier, you must pay the $15/person national park entrance fee.

3. Per local tipping customs in Alaska, a recommended gratuity of $20 per person per day is suggested. 
Kindly extend this tip directly to your guide or pilot on the day of your tour as a gesture of appreciation for their service.

4. Other expenses not mentioned in the itinerary or agreement.

html.primary:
1. This tour requires you to bring a photo ID, such as a foreign passport with an American visa, or an American driver’s license.

2. Minors under age 18 must be accompanied by an adult or provide a wavier signed by a legal guardian.

3. Please register 30 days in advance and provide the available date range, the specific departure date and departure time shall be subject to the actual reservation; If the reservation is unsuccessful, we will refund the project fee in full

4. The ID name of each guest should be provide, if you purchase a child ticket, please provide the child's date of birth when placing an order.

5. Please provide your personal weight (LBS) when registering due to small aircraft weight restrictions.

6. If the trip is cancelled due to weather, the tour fee will be refunded.

7. You will receive an electronic confirmation slip within 3 to 7 working days prior to your departure date.

8. Please check in at least 1hour early.

9. Thus miss the chance to aboard and cannot participate in the tour, we are afraid we cannot refund your fee.

shopify_mapping.title: “Midnight Sun”2026 Alaska Summer Season | Denali Flightseeing Tour Not including glacier landing
shopify_mapping.bodyHtml:
Departure Date

05/01/2026-09/30/2026: Daily

Cost Includes

1. Air ticket.

2. Service fees and taxes.

Cost Excludes

1. Transportation to/from the airplane office.

2. After successfully landing on the glacier, you must pay the $15/person national park entrance fee.

3. Per local tipping customs in Alaska, a recommended gratuity of $20 per person per day is suggested. 
Kindly extend this tip directly to your guide or pilot on the day of your tour as a gesture of appreciation for their service.

4. Other expenses not mentioned in the itinerary or agreement.

Cancellation Policy

1. For cancelations or changing within 12 days of the tour date, no refund will be given.

2. Cancellation or change more than 12 days before departure, 70% of the fee will be refunded.

Know Before You Book

1. This tour requires you to bring a photo ID, such as a foreign passport with an American visa, or an American driver’s license.

2. Minors under age 18 must be accompanied by an adult or provide a wavier signed by a legal guardian.

3. Please register 30 days in advance and provide the available date range, the specific departure date and departure time shall be subject to the actual reservation; If the reservation is unsuccessful, we will refund the project fee in full

4. The ID name of each guest should be provide, if you purchase a child ticket, please provide the child's date of birth when placing an order.

5. Please provide your personal weight (LBS) when registering due to small aircraft weight restrictions.

6. If the trip is cancelled due to weather, the tour fee will be refunded.

7. You will receive an electronic confirmation slip within 3 to 7 working days prior to your departure date.

8. Please check in at least 1hour early.

9. Thus miss the chance to aboard and cannot participate in the tour, we are afraid we cannot refund your fee.
